overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a gray business suit walking through a futuristic medical facility lobby. The scene features large curved glass windows overlooking an alien rocky landscape, prominent holographic medical signage, and modern interior design with teal accents and orange seating.

scene_state.functional_zone: medical facility entrance lobby with holographic signage

agents.ego_description: character in gray business suit walking steadily along the glass windows past the large medical hologram

entered.detail: large blue holographic display with medical cross symbol and 'RELIANT MEDICAL' text
floor-to-ceiling curved glass wall overlooking rocky alien landscape
rows of orange upholstered chairs arranged in the waiting area
modern spherical pendant lights hanging from the ceiling
large rocky geological formations visible through the exterior windows

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the entrance of a futuristic medical facility, passing a prominent blue holographic sign for 'Reliant Medical.' Large curved glass windows on the left reveal an alien rocky landscape outside, while orange waiting chairs line the right side of the carpeted lobby.

scene_state.functional_zone: waiting area with decorative wall panels and elevator access

events.description: large potted plant temporarily blocks the camera view as character passes by

agents.ego_description: continuing through the lobby along the interior wall, passing seated patients

notable_agents.action: person in yellow coat walking across the lobby from left to right

entered.detail: wall with teal geometric lattice decoration patterns
pair of elevator doors with green illuminated panels
wall-mounted display screen showing medical information

segments.scene_description: The character turns along the interior wall featuring decorative teal geometric patterns, moving away from the windows. An elevator bank with green-lit doors appears on the left. The camera briefly passes behind a large potted plant causing a momentary occlusion, while other patients are seen sitting in the orange chairs and a person in a yellow coat walks across the space.

events.description: character slows down and stops near the pharmacy reception desk

agents.ego_description: approaching the pharmacy counter and slowing to a stop near the reception area

notable_agents.action: person sitting in orange chair near the reception desk waiting

entered.detail: hanging illuminated sign with 'Pharmacy' text and medical symbol
counter desk with glass partition and medical equipment
small holographic medical display near the reception area

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the pharmacy reception area where a hanging sign marks the desk. The reception counter features glass partitions and holographic displays. Other patients are visible waiting near the desk as the character slows and comes to a stop, with the decorative green wall and elevator doors remaining visible on the left side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic medical lobby that shifts from an open, windowed entrance to a focused pharmacy reception area. It begins as the character enters the facility, passing a blue holographic Reliant Medical sign while large curved windows reveal a rocky alien landscape to the left and orange seating to the right. As the character turns away from the windows, the view shifts toward an interior wall with teal geometric patterns and a bank of green-lit elevator doors, briefly obscured by a large potted plant as other patients and a person in a yellow coat move through the space. The scene then opens up toward the pharmacy reception area, where the camera glides past glass partitions and holographic displays. Finally, the character slows to a stop before the reception desk, with the decorative green wall and elevators remaining visible in the background.
